examples: It would be odd if the rising convection currents kept exact pace with them.
Theoretically, this convection would carry the continental plates along as though they were on a conveyor belt.
Another possibility is that the sinking plate cools the neighboring mantle and produces convection currents that move the plates.
The real question is do we have the will to listen, and the convection to respond.
Unlike Dr Hallett's convection-grown snowflakes, Dr Libbrecht's electrically generated crystals have no obvious applications.
